description: Final human labels for 126 HIGH-confidence pairs with refined escape definitions

definitions.escape: Reached users/production, no automated system caught it. A human discovered the problem.
definitions.machine_catch: CI/tests/build/lint broke. The infrastructure caught it before users were affected. System worked.
definitions.not_related: Ports, backports, cherry-picks, release bundling, enhancements, unrelated PRs, planned follow-up work.
